steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The blank precedes the plural noun “letters.” The word must be a plural demonstrative adjective to function correctly with this noun.

steps.title: Apply number agreement
steps.content: Demonstrative adjectives must agree in number with the noun they modify. “These” is plural and matches “letters.” The choices “one,” “that,” and “this” are all singular forms that violate number agreement with the plural noun. That matches choice D — D is correct.
